spectral_adds_within_EC.note: Spectral features add 5.9% R^2 for predicting torsion within EC. Modest but real.

gue_vs_arithmos.note: GUE features correlate with Arithmos at rho=0.09-0.14. Significant (p<0.001) but weak. The spectral phoneme sees the arithmetic structure dimly — through a different window.

verdict: Spectral features add 5.9% to the within-EC prediction of torsion. They do NOT crack the 21% residual — they contribute modestly. The GUE statistics (kurtosis, NN ratio) see Arithmos at rho~0.10. The spectral window is real but narrow.
